mapper.sql: id, vin, part_id, vehicle_node_code, device_item, bind_time, bind_type, bind_by, bind_org, unbind_time, unbind_reason, unbind_by, unbind_org, bind_state, replace_of_binding_id, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vehicle_part ( id, vin, part_id, vehicle_node_code, device_item, bind_time, bind_type, bind_by, bind_org, unbind_time, unbind_reason, unbind_by, unbind_org, bind_state, replace_of_binding_id, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{vin}, #{partId}, #{vehicleNodeCode}, #{deviceItem}, #{bindTime}, #{bindType}, #{bindBy}, #{bindOrg}, #{unbindTime}, #{unbindReason}, #{unbindBy}, #{unbindOrg}, #{bindState}, #{replaceOfBindingId}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_vehicle_part ( id, vin, part_id, vehicle_node_code, device_item, bind_time, bind_type, bind_by, bind_org, unbind_time, unbind_reason, unbind_by, unbind_org, bind_state, replace_of_binding_id, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.vin}, #{item.partId}, #{item.vehicleNodeCode}, #{item.deviceItem}, #{item.bindTime}, #{item.bindType}, #{item.bindBy}, #{item.bindOrg}, #{item.unbindTime}, #{item.unbindReason}, #{item.unbindBy}, #{item.unbindOrg}, #{item.bindState}, #{item.replaceOfBindingId}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_vehicle_part t SET
t.vin = #{vin},
t.part_id = #{partId},
t.vehicle_node_code = #{vehicleNodeCode},
t.device_item = #{deviceItem},
t.bind_time = #{bindTime},
t.bind_type = #{bindType},
t.bind_by = #{bindBy},
t.bind_org = #{bindOrg},
t.unbind_time = #{unbindTime},
t.unbind_reason = #{unbindReason},
t.unbind_by = #{unbindBy},
t.unbind_org = #{unbindOrg},
t.bind_state = #{bindState},
t.replace_of_binding_id = #{replaceOfBindingId},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_vehicle_part t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.vin = #{vin} AND t.part_id = #{partId} AND t.bind_state = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.vin = #{vin} AND t.vehicle_node_code = #{vehicleNodeCode} AND t.bind_state = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.part_id = #{partId} AND t.bind_state = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_vehicle_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
